name: final-answer-completeness
triggers: The task contains two or more question marks
The task contains a numbered question list
The task dictates the answer's shape ('in 3 bullets', 'as a table', 'yes or no', 'one paragraph', 'JSON only')
The task mandates verbatim machine-parsed output lines ('lines exactly of the form...', 'parsed by a script')
An explicit question in the task has no answer location in the draft
counterindications: A single question whose answer is plainly present in the draft; mapping is overhead
The user rescoped or withdrew questions mid-session; the latest instruction supersedes
